jsonLd.title: Xpressbees is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Xpressbees invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!
